overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character wearing a traditional straw raincoat and wide-brimmed hat running through a snowy forest at night. The character traverses deep snow beneath moonlit pine trees before passing under a heavy snow-laden branch.

agents.ego_description: samurai character running steadily through deep snow in a moonlit forest, leaving footprints behind

entered.detail: dense forest of snow-laden pine trees surrounding the path on both sides
bright full moon visible through cloudy night sky illuminating the snow
deep snow covering the forest floor with visible footprints trailing behind
snow-covered mountains visible in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs through an open snowy forest at night, with the full moon illuminating the snow-covered pines. The camera follows from behind as the character leaves footprints in the deep snow, approaching a denser section of trees on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with low hanging snow-covered branches

events.description: character approaches and passes under a heavily snow-laden pine branch that hangs low over the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward while passing beneath a snow-covered tree branch that bends under the weight of snow

entered.detail: heavy snow-covered pine branch hanging low over the path creating a partial canopy

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser section of forest and passes under a heavy snow-laden pine branch that hangs low over the path. The sky becomes partially obscured as the camera moves through the semi-covered space, with the moon and distant mountains no longer visible behind the dense foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit snowy forest that gradually transitions from an open landscape into a dense, enclosed thicket. It begins by trailing a samurai running through deep snow, with the full moon brightly illuminating the surrounding snow-covered pines. As the character moves forward, the camera follows the footprints left in the powder while approaching a more crowded section of trees on the right. The scene then shifts as the samurai enters the denser forest, passing beneath a heavy, snow-laden pine branch that hangs low over the path. Finally, the open sky and distant mountains vanish from view as the camera moves into the semi-covered space, leaving the character enveloped by thick foliage.
